name: village-green-demo-data
description: Deterministic RI-lore demo dataset generator + loaders for Village Green

//.doctor: schema-drift check only (also auto-runs before every other command)
//.seed: generator -> direct SQL INSERTs into the dev DB (no API needed)
//.emit: generator -> demo-appdata.jsonl, built LOCALLY by this tool (meta date pinned for byte-identical output)
//.import: generated JSONL -> the app's POST /op/appdata importer (needs API + mock OIDC)
//.export: the app's GET /op/appdata exporter -> appdata-export.jsonl (whatever is in the DB now, serialized by the app)
//.roundtrip: seed -> emit -> import -> sanity, exercising both load paths end to end
